---
title: "LaTeX Test"
---

## Complex equations

::: {.editable}
Inline math: $\alpha$, $\beta$, $\gamma$

Display math:
$$
x^* = \left\{
    \begin{array}{ll}
      \dfrac{x^\lambda - 1}{\lambda {x}^{\lambda - 1}}, & \lambda \neq 0 \\
      {x} \log x & \lambda = 0
    \end{array}
  \right.
$$

More LaTeX: $\sum_{i=1}^{n} x_i$ and $\int_0^\infty e^{-x} dx$
:::
